message.content:
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor HCP as hcp1 #BlueCircle# at 0% scale .5


participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPPPIS #GreenRectangle# 
box Community A #LightGray#
    participant Aggregator as AGGREGATOR #GreenRectangle#  
    participant CO-Registry as COREGISTRY #GreenRectangle#   
    participant CO-Repositiory as COREPOSITORY #GreenRectangle#    
end box 

participant OC-RGW as OCRGW #CyanRectangle#     
box Community X #LightGray#       
   participant OC-Registry as OCREGISTRY #CyanRectangle#      
   participant OC-Repositoriy as OCREPOSITIORY #CyanRectangle#        
 end box
 
'== Get All Immunization Data ==
hcp1 -> GFPPPIS : [01] Get all immunization data\nactivate GFPPPIS \n| | activate hcp1\ndeactivate hcp1\n||deactivate GFPPPIS ||
group query registries loop over communities[CommunityA]\nhcbp->AGGREGATOR:[02]queryallregistries\nactivatehcbp\naggregatortocoregistry:\nregistrystoredrequestiti8\nactivatescoregistery\coregistrystoocrw:requestcommunities\nactivecrwg\ncregwtoocregristey:registorquestitil38\...'.split('\n')[-1]) if len(line.split()) > 6 else line) for i,line enumerate(text_lines)] final_output = "\".join(processed_text_list[:-4])+\"\\ntextualdescriptionprovidedabovecontainsdetailedexplanationaboutsequenceoffunctionalitiesperformedduringanypatientvisitwhereindatafrommultiplesourcesareintegratedtocomprehensiveviewindividual'
